annotation_target.structure: Coda consequent — final C major cadences, clean conclusion
teaching_goals: the movement ends cleanly and simply — no lingering
style_tips: clean final cadence — no ritardando unless marked

teaching_notes.note: Final C major — decisive and clean. Mozart ends without sentiment.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 85–88 of Piano Sonata No. 16 in C Major, K. 545, I. Allegro (continuation of mm. 81–84), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 85–88 and describe the final close.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 85–88.
Measures 85–88 bring the coda toward its conclusion — the final C major cadences approach and the piece will end cleanly and simply. Let me loop mm. 85–88.
Mozart K545 mm. 85–88: coda conclusion, final C major cadences. Pairs with mm. 81–84.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
